channel.title: Digital Rights on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Digital Rights on simeononsecurity

item.title: Flock Finder: Open-Source Tool for Mapping Flock Safety ALPR Surveillance Cameras
item.category: "Privacy Technology" , "Counter Surveillance" , "Open Source Projects" , "Digital Rights" , "Network Security" , "Privacy Tools" , "Hardware Hacking" , "Security Research"
item.description: Flock Finder is an open-source tool that maps 40,000+ Flock Safety ALPR cameras worldwide using WiGLE WiFi data and OUI fingerprinting. Learn how it works, its limitations, and the hardware tools for real-time detection.

item.title: Flock Safety Camera Surveillance: Prevalence, Privacy Concerns, and Protection Strategies in 2026
item.category: "Privacy Technology" , "Surveillance Systems" , "Digital Rights" , "Law Enforcement Technology" , "Privacy Protection" , "Counter Surveillance" , "Civil Liberties" , "Technology Ethics" , "Smart City Infrastructure" , "Security Hardware"
item.description: Discover the widespread deployment of Flock Safety ALPR cameras in 2026, understand the privacy implications, and learn effective counter-surveillance strategies including detection devices.

item.title: Flock-You Detection Project: Complete Counter-Surveillance Hardware and Setup Guide 2026
item.category: "Security Hardware" , "Counter Surveillance" , "Privacy Technology" , "Open Source Projects" , "ESP32 Development" , "WiFi Monitoring" , "Privacy Tools" , "Digital Rights" , "Hardware Hacking" , "Network Security"
item.description: Comprehensive technical guide to the open-source Flock-You project for detecting Flock Safety ALPR cameras using ESP32-based hardware. Includes setup instructions, firmware details, and purchasing options.

item.title: Demystifying GDPR: Your Guide to Data Privacy Regulations
item.description: Discover the significance of GDPR in safeguarding personal data. Explore its principles, rights, and business impact.

item.title: helping Privacy: Understanding the CCPA and Your Rights
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Data Privacy" , "Legislation" , "Digital Rights" , "Consumer Protection" , "California Law" , "Online Privacy" , "Data Regulation" , "Privacy Rights" , "Personal Data"
item.description: Explore the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and learn how it helps consumers to control their data privacy.

item.title: Securing Vulnerable Groups: Cyber Threats and Protection Strategies
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Privacy" , "Digital Safety" , "Online Threats" , "Data Protection" , "Technology" , "Digital Rights" , "Information Security" , "Cyber Espionage" , "Online Privacy"
item.description: Discover how cyber attacks by foreign powers impact vulnerable groups and effective protection strategies.

item.title: Exploring the Dark Web: Unveiling Hidden Services and Risks
item.category: "Technology and Internet" , "Cybersecurity" , "Digital Privacy" , "Criminal Activities" , "Cryptocurrencies" , "Online Marketplaces" , "Communication Platforms" , "Whistleblowing" , "Digital Rights" , "Law Enforcement"
item.description: Discover the Dark Web, its hidden services, and potential risks as we dig into the depths of the internet's hidden side.

item.title: Recommended Organizations to Support
item.category: "Recommended Organizations" , "Support" , "Online Privacy" , "Freedom of Expression" , "Democratic Values" , "EPIC" , "EFF" , "Privacy" , "Civil Liberties" , "Human Rights" , "Digital Activism" , "Nonprofit Organizations" , "Donation" , "Digital Rights" , "Data Protection" , "Cybersecurity" , "Net Neutrality" , "Online Anonymity" , "Censorship"
item.description: Support the Electronic Privacy Information Center (EPIC) and Electronic Frontier Foundation (EFF) to protect online privacy, freedom of expression, and democratic values. Donate to defend human rights and liberties in the digital world.
